parameters.jsCode:
const userId = $('Webhook: POST /corrections/list').first().json.body.user_id;
return [{ json: { user_id: userId } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.id           AS user_id,
  u.name         AS user_name,
  u.level        AS user_level,
  u.avatar_url   AS user_avatar,
  c.id           AS correction_id,
  c.wrong_text,
  c.correct_text,
  c.reason,
  c.topic,
  c.created_at,
  s.topic        AS session_topic,
  v.vocab_word   AS vocab_word,
  -- Stats via window functions (no separate query needed)
  COUNT(*)                                              OVER() AS total_corrections,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.topic ILIKE '%grammar%')    OVER() AS grammar_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.topic ILIKE '%vocab%')      OVER() AS vocab_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.topic ILIKE '%syntax%')     OVER() AS syntax_count
FROM public.users u
INNER JOIN public.corrections c ON c.user_id = u.id
LEFT  JOIN public.sessions s    ON s.id = c.session_id
LEFT  JOIN public.vocabularies v ON v.id = c.vocabulary_id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: true, message: 'user_id is required', code: 400 }) }}
